author: doll-agent
content: Implemented MaskedArray::ma_dot_flat (inner-product on flattened views, masked positions on either side contribute zero), MaskedArray::trace(k) for 2-D (sum of k-th diagonal, skipping masked entries), ma_unique(ma) (sorted unique unmasked values as Array<T, Ix1>), ma_isin(ma, test_values) and ma_in1d(ma, test_values) (membership test preserving mask). dot/inner/outer for matrix arguments are deferred to a future ma::linalg module — they need broadcast logic plus mask-aware product semantics that mirror numpy.ma.dot's 'mask any contributing pair, mask the output' rule. polyfit/convolve/correlate/corrcoef/cov are also deferred (would pull in ferray-polynomial / ferray-stats; users can call those directly on the .compressed() unmasked subset). Set ops setdiff1d/setxor1d/intersect1d/union1d are deferred (compose with .compressed() + ferray-stats).
